content:
Professional Summary # I am a Full-Stack Software Engineer with 5 years of experience delivering robust, end-to-end solutions for high-impact initiatives. Proven track record of success on high-profile projects, including the European Space Agency (ESA) sponsored Track & Trust platform, where I integrated satellite data for global supply chain transparency. I specialize in building secure, scalable architectures, such as the MOBIX eco-travel ecosystem, where I engineered fraud-detection logic and cross-platform extensions. A versatile developer creating seamless user experiences within complex, data-driven environments.
Technical Expertise # Programming Languages # Java, Kotlin, Dart, TypeScript, Python, and C#. Frameworks & Environments # Server-Side: Spring Boot and Nest.js (Node.js). Mobile: Native Android and Flutter. Web: Angular, RxJS, and Next.js. Infrastructure & Data # Data Stores: PostgreSQL and MongoDB. Tools: Git, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Docker, and AI-Assisted Development. Professional Experience # Software Engineer | Byte Trix # May 2023 — Present
Track & Trust (ESA): Engineered an ESA-sponsored supply-chain platform that integrates satellite telemetry and blockchain for global transparency. MOBIX Ecosystem: Expanded the MOBIX app via a Flutter-based extension, improving cross-platform consistency. Internal Systems: Developed operational modules using the ERPNext/Frappe Framework to improve development efficiency. Full-Stack Software Developer | Ester # Nov 2021 — May 2023
Delivered core features for the MOBIX eco-travel rewards wallet and secure QR partner integrations. Built validation logic to detect location and data spoofing, ensuring legitimate reward distribution. Junior Software Developer | Sorsix # Jun 2021 — Aug 2021
Contributed to backend services and frontend workflows for a large-scale healthcare platform. Gained experience in secure REST APIs and compliance practices under senior guidance. Education # B.S. in Software Engineering # Ss. Cyril and Methodius University in Skopje (UKIM) Sep 2017 — Dec 2023
Skills & Languages # Soft Skills: Time Management, Teamwork & Collaboration, Clear Communication, Adaptability, and Problem Solving. Languages: Macedonian (Native) and English (Fluent). Contact Me
Location: Skopje, Macedonia Email: david.petkov10@gmail.com Phone: +38976360333
title: About David Petkov

content:
“I’m not planning to add more posts after this one.”
I suppose I shouldn’t have added a blog section, but I like how it looks and I like people expressing their opinions and thoughts on a blog; there is also some nostalgic element in there somewhere. 🏛️
If I find something interesting, I just might share it and at the same time use these posts as some kind of journal, but I doubt that will happen. 📓
Note: This post was tidied up and formatted for Markdown by an AI who clearly enjoys the “blog section” more than the author does. 😉
title: Initial Post
